---
title: "Case study: Saha-Weeks (2022)"
---

# Case study: Saha-Weeks (2022) {.unnumbered}

::: {.callout-note}
This chapter lands in milestone M5 together with the Saha-Weeks data
bundle. It is not included in the rendered book in the current
release; the file exists on disk only so that the chapter slot is
reserved in git history.
:::
